ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the season took place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, postseason) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats by the player in the season */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player in the season */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player in the season */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs hit by the player in the season */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in by the player in the season */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases by the player in the season */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage of the player in the season */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage of the player in the season */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging of the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fielding_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fielding statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "putouts" INTEGER /* Number of putouts by the player in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the season */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors by the player in the season */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage of the player in the season */,
  "range_factor" REAL /* Range factor of the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fielding_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fielding_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the position (e.g., 1B, SS, CF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view_stats, edit_stats) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the player */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the injury belongs to */,
  "injury" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to recover */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, rehab, cleared) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the award belongs to */,
  "award" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the award was won in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "data" TEXT /* Serialized player data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_versions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the log belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent in the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game */,
  "stats" TEXT /* Serialized game statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
